## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo build --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo nextest run` (or `cargo test --workspace`) passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` clean
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed (README / CONFIG.md / THEMING.md / PLUGINS.md)
- [ ] No telemetry, account, or off-device data flow introduced (telemetry-free invariant)
